betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Emergency Gear§f

§aEquip personal protective gear and emergency response items to survive industrial accidents!§f
Working around high-voltage power lines, radiation, steam, and lava increases the risk of accidents. Prepare proper safety equipment.

§6First Aid & Medkits§f:
§b• Medkit§f: A high-tier medical supply. When used, it regenerates player health almost instantly, with an effect duration of only §e150 milliseconds§f. Keep one on your hotbar for emergency healing.
§b• First Aid Cabinet§f: A wall-mounted container to store medkits, bandages, and fire extinguishers for quick access.

§6Fire Extinguishers§f:
§b• Fire Extinguisher§f: Discharges a pressurized carbon dioxide spray to put out fires and suppress steam leaks.
§b• Nether Utility§f: Fully functional on §bNether Lava§f (`fireExtinguisherOnNether=true`), allowing you to freeze lava surfaces and pave safe walking paths through the Underworld.

§6Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)§f:
§b• HAZMAT Suit§f: Protects your body from toxic environments, radiation leaks, and industrial waste.
§b• Safety Helmets & Safety Glasses§f: Protect against head injuries and flash blindness around arc furnaces.
